case_title: AGUILAR, EDWIN ANTONIO vs. LEMUS,MIGUEL ANGEL IND&DBA M&L JANITORIAL SERVICE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUILAR, EDWIN ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT LEMUS,MIGUEL ANGEL IND&DBA M&L JANITORIAL SERVICE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUILAR, EDWIN ANTONIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEMUS,MIGUEL ANGEL IND&DBA M&L JANITORIAL SERVICE $2,407.19 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,487.19
